hero.headline: Pink House
hero.subheadline: A warm, welcoming bed & breakfast nestled in the heart of Koh Samui, Thailand.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: A Home Away From Home
about.p1: Pink House is a charming bed & breakfast on the beautiful island of Koh Samui, Thailand. We offer comfortable rooms, a warm atmosphere, and personalised service in English, French, German, and Thai.
about.p2: Whether you are here for a short escape or an extended stay, our team is dedicated to making every moment of your visit memorable. Wake up to a fresh breakfast, take a dip in the pool, and let the island's magic do the rest.

rooms.label: Accommodation
rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Each room is thoughtfully furnished to balance comfort, style, and the relaxed spirit of island life.

items.name: Standard Room
items.description: Cosy and bright, our standard room features a queen bed, en-suite bathroom, air conditioning, and a private balcony overlooking the tropical garden.

items.name: Deluxe Room
items.description: Spacious and elegant with a king bed, premium linens, a rain shower, and a terrace with pool view — perfect for couples seeking a little extra luxury.

items.name: Family Suite
items.description: Our largest accommodation, the family suite features two bedrooms, a living area, kitchenette, and a private terrace — ideal for families or groups of friends.

amenities.label: Facilities
amenities.title: Everything You Need
amenities.subtitle: All the comforts of home, with the warmth of a boutique guesthouse.

items.title: Swimming Pool
items.desc: Outdoor pool open daily from 7 am to 9 pm

items.title: Air Conditioning
items.desc: Individual climate control in every room

items.title: Breakfast Included
items.desc: Fresh daily breakfast with local & Western options

items.title: WhatsApp Support
items.desc: Reach us anytime via WhatsApp for any request

items.title: Airport Transfer
items.desc: Convenient pick-up and drop-off on request

items.title: Multilingual Staff
items.desc: Assistance in English, French, German & Thai

items.quote: Staying at Pink House was the highlight of our Koh Samui trip. The warmth of the hosts and the beautiful garden made us feel instantly at home.
items.name: Sophie & Marc

items.quote: The most charming bed and breakfast we have ever visited. Breakfast was exceptional, the room immaculate, and the location perfect for exploring the island.
items.name: James & Karen

items.quote: We came back for the third time this year — that says everything. Pink House is not just a place to sleep, it is a place to belong.
items.name: Thomas

contact.label: Find Us
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach us by WhatsApp, email, or use the form below.
